problem id: 12e0ac8c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  11111101 -> 01110101
  01010000 -> 10101011
  11011001 -> 11101101
  10001010 -> 01110101
  01111110 -> 10011000
  10110001 -> 01010111
  10100100 -> 01000111
  10100110 -> 11001111
  01010111 -> 01110110
  01011100 -> 10011000

query: 10011100
predicted answer: 10101001
